properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I count my blessings one by one Your goodness in my life How could I ask for more? In You, I'm satisfied

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: All the mountains that I ascend They leave me empty time and time again I fix my eyes on this reward The world behind me now and You before

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I count my blessings one by one Your goodness in my life How could I ask for more? In You, I'm satisfied If You are all I have I know that I will find That You are all I need In You, I'm satisfied

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: So let my life be freely spent For what only, only You can give My richest gain I count as loss When I survey the wonder of the cross

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Nothing else, nothing else Nothing else will ever satisfy No one else, no one else No one else will ever satisfy There's nothing else There's nothing else that will ever satisfy There's no one else, no There's no one else

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I count my blessings one by one Your goodness in my life How could I ask for more? In You, I'm satisfied If You are all I have I know that I will find That You are all I need In You, I'm satisfied, oh

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: You satisfy my soul (nothing else) My soul (nothing else) Oh, yes, You do (nothing else will ever satisfy) You satisfy my soul (no one else) My soul (no one else) Oh, yes, You do (no one else will ever satisfy) Nothing else, nothing else Nothing else will ever satisfy No one else, no one else No one else will ever satisfy
